<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And my friends, I hope you will attend some of these 21 services here at St. John's, a<|7.60|> <|7.60|> chance to come together in community, to pause from all of the hustle and bustle, all of<|15.16|> <|15.16|> the distractions, to sit, to breathe deeply, to pay attention to Advent, and to be reminded<|27.34|> <|27.34|> that we are going to be a part of the church.<|28.70|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> that God is still speaking,<|2.98|> <|4.28|> and our part in that is to still be listening,<|8.24|> <|9.36|> that God is still relevant,<|12.66|> <|14.32|> and that God is still sovereign.<|17.52|> <|18.58|> And that is good news in any age.<|22.12|> <|23.72|> Amen.<|24.08|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Amen.<|0.10|><|endoftext|>
